findings.justification: The wp_ajax_um_get_icons handler (admin-only by wp_ajax_ prefix) calls only UM()->admin()->check_ajax_nonce() for CSRF protection but never calls current_user_can() or any capability check, so any authenticated user (e.g., subscriber) who obtains the um-admin-nonce can invoke this admin endpoint and enumerate the full icon list; the data returned is non-sensitive but the endpoint is intended for admin use only.
